rationale: The cited paper’s focus (economy/premium private-label introductions and brand choice context effects in two U.K. categories) is substantively different from the citing paper’s main question (chain vs. outlet loyalty in store acquisitions and post-takeover store choice). However, the available linkage evidence is only a bare DOI match (no in-text citation context or reference text), so it is not safe to conclude this is clearly an incidental mention.
